# Nishant Raj

> Full Stack and Backend Engineer, open-source contributor, and independent thinker who builds practical products with AI.

Nishant Raj (dawgdevv) designs and ships end-to-end systems: AI integrations, backend services, full-stack apps, and cloud deployments. He has worked with startups, freelanced, contributes to open source, and uses Linux daily.

## Contact

- Email: nraj02415@gmail.com
- Portfolio: https://dawgdevv.tech/
- Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

## Focus areas

- AI integration into products and workflows
- Backend optimization and API design
- Full-stack product development
- Cloud deployments and Linux systems
- Open-source contributions

## Hiring / collaboration

Available for projects with founders, startups, and teams who need someone to turn ideas into shipped systems. Prefer clear communication and practical engineering over process theater.

Preferred contact: nraj02415@gmail.com
